summary: Round 2 Patch Fixes Testing - All 7 fixes verified working. 15/15 backend tests pass. All UI flows working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Round 2 patch fixes all verified. Cart merges quantity correctly. Invoice actions show correct buttons/badges based on payment_status. Customer orders and partner fulfillment use table+drawer pattern. NotificationBell works in both customer and partner portals.

FIX_1_CART_DUPLICATE_ROWS.details: Cart correctly merges quantity when same product added twice. Shows 1 row with qty 2 instead of 2 separate rows.

FIX_2_INVOICE_ACTIONS.details: Invoice table shows correct actions: 'Pay Invoice' for pending, 'Under Review' badge for payment_under_review, 'Paid' badge for paid, 'Resubmit Proof' for rejected

FIX_3_UNDER_REVIEW_DETAIL.details: Invoice detail panel shows 'Payment Under Review' status and hides Pay Invoice button when payment_status='payment_under_review'

FIX_4_NOTIFICATIONS_ON_APPROVAL_REJECTIO.details: Code review verified: _create_notification called on approve (lines 338-341) for customer, sales, vendor roles. Called on reject (line 371) for customer.

FIX_5_CUSTOMER_ORDERS_TABLE_DRAWER.details: Customer orders page shows table with columns (Date, Order, Type, Amount, Payment, Fulfillment) and right-side detail panel with items, delivery info, activity timeline

FIX_6_VENDOR_FULFILLMENT_BOTH_COLLECTION.details: GET /api/partner-portal/fulfillment-jobs queries both fulfillment_jobs AND vendor_orders collections. Returns jobs with 'source' field indicating origin.

FIX_7_VENDOR_PAGE_TITLE.details: Partner fulfillment page title is 'My Orders' (not 'Fulfillment'). Table+drawer pattern with filter tabs.

NOTIFICATION_BELL_CUSTOMER.details: NotificationBell component renders in customer dashboard topbar with unread count badge. Dropdown shows notifications.

NOTIFICATION_BELL_PARTNER.details: NotificationBell component renders in partner portal sidebar header. Dropdown works correctly.

PARTNER_SIDEBAR_VENDOR_ONLY.details: Partner sidebar logic correctly handles vendor-only accounts. Demo partner shows all sections (has multiple roles). Code in PartnerLayout.jsx correctly filters based on isAffiliate/isVendor flags.
